CustomField.description: When checked, execution time is always logged for this post-action regardless of whether it exceeds the threshold. Overrides the threshold setting. Useful for diagnosing specific slow post-actions during performance investigations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to always log execution time for this post-action, even when it runs below the threshold. Useful when diagnosing specific slow post-actions in production.
CustomField.label: Force Performance Logging
